hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); case "$cmd" in *"git push"*) printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"A git push just ran. If the pushed branch has an open pull request, update that PR description (via the GitHub PR update tool) to reflect what was just pushed: a short summary of the changes and current status.\"}}";; esac
